name: tune_agent_cognition
description: Allows the Alpha Agent to dynamically tune the cognitive and sampling parameters of other agents in the swarm based on mission needs.

agent_id.description: The unique identifier of the agent to tune (e.g., '1', 'specialist-node').

temperature.description: Adjust creativity/predictability. Range: 0.0 to 2.0. Higher is more creative.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling. Range: 0.0 to 1.0. Lower is more focused.

top_k.description: Vocabulary filtering. Range: 1 to 100. Lower is more conservative.

reasoning_depth.description: For reasoning-capable models, sets the maximum depth of thought chain.

rationale.description: The strategic reason for this adjustment (e.g., 'Increasing creativity for brainstorming phase').
